Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Maintaining Current Trial Date With Preference Or, In The Alternative, To Set A New Preferential Trial Date
Off Calendar Jul-24-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Plaintiff's motion to maintain the current trial date with preference.

APPEARANCES: Oren Noah, Esq. of Brayton Purcell LLP 898-1555 for pltf & moving party; no other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling - Plaintiff's motion to maintain the current trial date with preference is granted per C.C.P. 36(a). The current return trial date of September 23, 2013 is maintained with preference status. All dates related to discovery, motions and disclosures remain subject to the initial trial date of April 8, 2013, which has already passed. The 120th day is November 21, 2013. No opposition filed. Order signed. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Matter Not Reported (503/TLJ)
